title: Factor Parameters — Finance Proxy (v1.0)
description: Parameter sub-schema applied when factor_record.factor_family == 'finance_proxies'. Aligned with PCAF Global GHG Accounting and Reporting Standard (Parts A/B/C) for financed emissions. Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22.

asset_class.description: PCAF asset class. Determines the attribution formula applied by the resolver.

sector_code.description: Qualified sector code per NACE / NAICS / ISIC / GICS / SIC / CPC scheme (e.g., 'NAICS:221112', 'ISIC:C241', 'NACE:C.24.1').

intensity_basis.description: Normalisation metric for the proxy intensity. 'revenue' (per USD/EUR turnover); 'ebitda' (per USD/EUR EBITDA); 'asset_value' (per USD/EUR assets); 'employee_count' (per FTE); 'floor_area' (per m²); 'production_output' (per unit output).

geography.description: Geographic scope of the proxy (country ISO-α2, region, or 'XX' for global). Duplicates factor_record.jurisdiction.country for in-parameters filtering.

proxy_confidence_class.description: GreenLang proxy confidence class mapped to PCAF Data Quality Score: A = score 1 (verified company emissions); B = score 2 (unverified company); C = score 3 (physical activity proxy); D = score 4 (economic activity proxy); E = score 5 (sector average). INVARIANT: A requires supplier_primary_data_share >= 0.95.
